doc.prompt: Create a 500-word startup pitch for a new startup that will help people to find the best places to live. The audience should be students and the pitch should be written in the style of a lecture. Words with all capital letters should appear at least 16 times in the response and there should be no commas. The word batted should appear less than 2 times.

gen_args_0.arg_0: Create a 500-word startup pitch for a new startup that will help people to find the best places to live. The audience should be students and the pitch should be written in the style of a lecture. Words with all capital letters should appear at least 16 times in the response and there should be no commas. The word batted should appear less than 2 times.

resps:
**A Lecture Pitch For A Housing Startup**

Okay here is what I have decided to do.

## Welcome To Class

Good morning class. Today we will discuss a MASSIVE problem. Finding a place to live is incredibly stressful. Every single year millions of university students face housing anxiety. You refresh rental websites endlessly. You worry about terrible landlords. You worry about long commutes. You worry about safety. The current system is fundamentally broken. We must completely REVOLUTIONIZE the way we find shelter. We need a modern **SOLUTION**.

## The Core Problem

Look at the whiteboard behind me. Notice the shocking statistics. More than seventy percent of students report extreme stress during their housing search. They are exhausted. Scams are everywhere. Hidden fees drain your precious bank accounts. You compromise on quality because time runs out. The anxiety directly affects your academic **SUCCESS**. Your grades suffer when your living situation is unstable. Your mental health deteriorates when you sleep in substandard conditions. No one has successfully fixed this fractured market. The traditional real estate models ignore you entirely. The big tech platforms treat student housing as an afterthought. We cannot accept this harsh reality anymore. We refuse to let another generation suffer.

## Our Amazing Solution

Enter our new startup. We proudly call it **NESTMETRICS**. This platform is a COMPLETE game changer for student living. NESTMETRICS uses advanced machine learning to match you with your PERFECT apartment. We analyze millions of DATA points daily. We evaluate multiple crucial factors for your living arrangements:

*   Transit times to your specific campus buildings
*   Neighborhood noise levels during critical study hours
*   Proximity to affordable grocery stores
*   Local neighborhood safety statistics

We verify every single landlord thoroughly. You simply input your daily schedule and your tight budget. Our proprietary ALGORITHM does the heavy lifting. We GUARANTEE a perfectly scam-free environment. ZERO fake listings will ever survive our strict verification process.

## Business Model

The MARKET opportunity here is absolutely enormous. Students spend billions of dollars on housing annually. We will capture this value by charging property managers a small verification fee. The core service remains completely FREE for all students. This unique business model creates extreme **GROWTH** potential. We will launch at this university first. Then we will rapidly expand to every major campus nationwide. Our VISION is completely clear. We want to permanently ELIMINATE housing stress forever. You absolutely deserve a safe and comfortable HOME. You deserve a place that fosters academic brilliance.

## Call To Action

We are actively raising a seed round today. We need two million dollars to scale our initial engineering team. We must hire the best developers. Join us on this spectacular journey. Let us build the exciting FUTURE of housing together. Look closely at your course syllabus. My contact information is located at the very bottom. Reach out immediately if you want to invest or join our engineering team. Every single great idea starts in a classroom just like this one. You possess the incredible talent needed to execute this ambitious plan. Step up and take ACTION today. We welcome passionate students who want to build amazing products. Class is now officially dismissed. Go forth and embrace brilliant INNOVATION. Thank you for your wonderful attention today. Let us change the entire world together.


# A Lecture Pitch For A Housing Startup

Good morning class. Today we will discuss a MASSIVE problem. Finding a place to live is incredibly stressful. Every single year millions of university students face housing anxiety. You refresh rental websites endlessly. You worry about terrible landlords. You worry about long commutes. You worry about safety. The current system is fundamentally broken. Hidden fees drain your precious bank accounts. You compromise on quality because time runs out. The anxiety directly affects your academic **SUCCESS**. The traditional real estate models ignore you entirely. The big tech platforms treat student housing as an afterthought. We cannot accept this harsh reality anymore.
